Off Calendar Feb-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF OCEANVIEW VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION's Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two And Special Interrogatories, Set One is Off calendar. Set by clerical error. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Matthew P. Harrington, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Oceanview Village Homeowners Association.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Alixia Cheuk.
Michael Lemonds sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank and against Defendant Gawzia I. Indrawes as follows:
Principal $16,251.50
Pre-Judgment Interest $4,910.23
Attorney's Fees to be determined by the court. Counsel to file a declaration in support of attorney's fees.
Costs $609.85
Court ordered counsel for Plaintiff to submit Judgment form together with declaration re: attorney's fees within five days.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Set For Trial On Jan-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
